blend.name: Mountain Morning
blend.description: A bright, energizing herbal blend made from homegrown peppermint and lemon balm. The lemon balm softens the peppermint's edge and carries a clean citrus note. This is the blend that sells out first at the Saturday market.

recipe.ratio_note: 2 parts lemon balm to 1 part peppermint by dry weight
recipe.serving_suggestion: Unsweetened or with a small amount of raw honey

packaging.container: 4 oz kraft bag, heat-sealed, paper label

blend.notes: Bestseller. Replenish every 4 to 6 weeks through the market season. First batch of 2026 sold out in two market days.

blend.name: Night Watch
blend.description: A sedating, earthy blend designed for the hour before bed. Chamomile and lemon balm are calming. The valerian root adds depth and genuine sleep-supporting properties. Honey rounds out the valerian's earthiness. Not for use during pregnancy without provider guidance.

recipe.ratio_note: 3 parts chamomile to 2 parts lemon balm to 1 part valerian root by dry weight
recipe.serving_suggestion: With local wildflower honey. Drink 30 to 45 minutes before sleep.

packaging.container: 4 oz kraft bag, heat-sealed, paper label

blend.notes: New valerian ratio this fall season. Deeper than prior year. Last batch of the current stock. Reblend when chamomile supply allows.

blend.name: High Meadow
blend.description: Pure chamomile, nothing else. Grown in the raised beds and dried on the back porch. For the cup that does not need to be complicated. Mild, floral, and reliable.

recipe.serving_suggestion: Plain or with a light honey. Excellent iced.

packaging.container: 4 oz kraft bag, heat-sealed, paper label

blend.notes: Out of stock. Will reblend when 2026 chamomile is ready. Popular at holiday fairs as a gift item.

blend.name: Nettle Tonic
blend.description: Stinging nettle foraged from the ridge above the French Broad River, paired with a small amount of peppermint to brighten it. Grassy, mineral-forward, and nourishing. Works especially well as a long infusion or iced in warm weather.

recipe.ratio_note: 3 parts nettle leaf to 1 part peppermint by dry weight
recipe.temperature: Just-boiled water, covered while steeping. Can also cold-steep overnight.
recipe.serving_suggestion: Unsweetened or with lemon. Good iced.

ingredient.source: Foraged, Hominy Creek area, West Asheville, Spring 2025

packaging.container: 4 oz kraft bag, heat-sealed, paper label

blend.notes: Getting low on nettle stock. Plan early foraging run before season peaks.

blend.name: Porch Blend
blend.description: A test blend of chamomile and dried blackberry leaf. The blackberry adds a light astringency and earthy depth. Not yet gifted or sold. One small batch made in December 2025 for personal testing.

recipe.ratio_note: 2 parts chamomile to 1 part blackberry leaf by dry weight
recipe.serving_suggestion: Plain. Evaluate without sweetener to taste the tannin level.

ingredient.source: Foraged, forest edge near Black Balsam Road, Fall 2025

packaging.container: Small glass jar, unlabeled. Personal testing only.

blend.notes: Not for sale yet. Need a second and third tasting before deciding to add to the line. Potentially good as a limited holiday item in November 2026.

stockist.name: French Broad Food Co-op
stockist.terms: Net 30, consignment not accepted. Invoice on delivery.

stockist.name: High Ground Coffee
stockist.terms: Net 15. Pick up or delivery to store.

stockist.name: Hazel and Oak Provisions
stockist.blends_carried: Mountain Morning, Night Watch, High Meadow (seasonal)
stockist.terms: Net 30. Holiday orders placed by October 31.

market.name: West Asheville Tailgate Market
market.location: Haywood Road near Clingman Avenue, West Asheville, NC
market.hours: 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM (winter: 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM)

upcoming_fair.name: Asheville Holiday Craft Fair
upcoming_fair.expected_blends: Mountain Morning, Night Watch, High Meadow, Nettle Tonic, holiday gift boxes

upcoming_fair.name: River Arts District Holiday Market
upcoming_fair.location: RAD Studios, Depot Street, Asheville, NC
upcoming_fair.expected_blends: Mountain Morning, Night Watch, holiday gift boxes
